translation.en: They will get married at the end of the month.

notes:
cưới = to marry, to get married (usually focusing on the act of marrying someone).

It’s a verb and needs an object: you cưới ai (marry someone). It often goes with words about weddings like đám cưới (wedding), lễ cưới (wedding ceremony), vợ/chồng (wife/husband).

Related word: kết hôn = to get married (more formal, used in documents or announcements).
notes_md:
**cưới** = to marry, to get married (usually focusing on the act of marrying someone).

It’s a verb and needs an object: you **cưới ai** (marry someone). It often goes with words about weddings like *đám cưới* (wedding), *lễ cưới* (wedding ceremony), *vợ/chồng* (wife/husband).


Related word: **kết hôn** = to get married (more formal, used in documents or announcements).

content.sentence: Chúng tôi sẽ ___ vào cuối năm.

translation.en: We will get married at the end of the year.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I want to marry you next autumn.
My older sister will marry her lover at the end of this month.
My friend plans to marry after finishing university.

definitions.en: To marry or to get married.
definitions.vi: Kết hôn hoặc tổ chức lễ cưới.

example.en: They will get married at the end of this month.
example.vi: Họ sẽ cưới vào cuối tháng này.
example.es: Ellos se casarán a finales de este mes.

exampleSentences: Anh muốn cưới em vào mùa thu năm sau.
Chị gái anh sẽ cưới người yêu vào cuối tháng này.
Bạn của em định cưới sau khi học xong đại học.
